query:
-- Test öğrenci 1'in ID'sini al ve user_stages'ı kontrol et
SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.stageId, us.status, us.unlockedAt, us.completedAt, s.name as stageName, s.order
FROM user_stages us
JOIN stages s ON us.stageId = s.id
JOIN users u ON us.userId = u.id
WHERE u.email = 'test.ogrenci1@gmail.com'
ORDER BY s.order;

SELECT us.id, us.userId, us.stageId, us.status, us.unlockedAt, us.completedAt, s.name as stageName, s.order

JOIN users u ON us.userId = u.id
